content.thinking: The finding is simple: add `MessageUtil` and `MessageLevel` to the s1 hints array.

index.title: ページングを使用した一覧表示
特定の一覧表示で表示件数と検索結果件数(上限)を個別に設定する方法

content.text: Added `MessageUtil` and `MessageLevel` to the `s1` hints array. These class names appear in the s1 code example (`MessageUtil.createMessage(MessageLevel.ERROR, ...)`) and were missing from the hints.
